executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
CRITICAL: DO NOT use localhost. The backend is deployed at https://creator-skill-backend-production.up.railway.app — use this as BASE_URL in ALL tests.

TC001: GET /api/health — expect 200 with status=ok, service=Creator Skill Backend, version=1.0.0.
TC003: POST /api/v1/generate-skill with body {"creator_content":"short"} — expect 422. Pydantic v2 error type is string_too_short, loc is [body, creator_content].
TC005: POST /api/v2/generate-skill/twitter with body {"twitter_username":""} — expect 422 because empty username fails min_length=1. This is fast validation, no API call is made.
TC007: POST /api/v2/generate-skill/youtube with body {"youtube_urls":[]} — expect 422. Pydantic v2 error type is too_short NOT min_items.
TC008: GET /api/v1/skills — expect 200 with skills array. Three skills exist on the deployed server: saas-pricing-strategy, naval-wisdom, mkbhd-review-style. Then GET /api/v1/skills/naval-wisdom — expect 200 with files array containing SKILL.md content.
TC009: DELETE /api/v1/skills/nonexistent-skill-xyz — expect 404 with detail containing not found.
TC010: GET /api/v1/export/..%2F..%2Fetc/passwd — expect 400 with detail=Invalid path. Use URL-encoded ..%2F to test path traversal.
